results.title: REST list endpoints return non-deterministic results across identical calls — even with `orderBy` on a sortable field and a `gte` filter
results.summary: Min Jaccard across 10 pairs = 0.000 (1.0 means identical sets). Identical calls — same skip/limit, working orderBy on id, working `gte` filter on createdDate — returned different ID sets.

results.title: `orderBy` is honored on `id` but ignored on `createdDate` and `updatedDate`
results.summary: orderBy={"id":"asc"} produced 0/49 alphabetic inversions on UUIDs (effectively sorted). Same syntax on createdDate: ≥19/49 inversions across 8 encodings. On updatedDate: ≥21/49 inversions across 8 encodings. Neither date field is orderable. collate=true on createdDate: 25 inversions.

results.title: `limit` parameter silently clamped at 100
results.summary: Requested limit=500, received 100 rows (clamped to 100). No 4xx, no warning header.
